title: Availability, Disaster Recovery, and Validation · Operations Brief: Net Dr Testing
summary: Define recovery objectives and prove branch, service, configuration, and site recovery under realistic failures. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net dr testing increment in a tested network continuity plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Run tabletop and validation tests with scenarios, observers, success criteria, rollback, evidence, and remediation owners.
Compare active-active and active-passive designs including health checks, state, quorum, load, split brain, and failover.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.

steps.title: Predict Net Dr Testing
